description_long: This is an open sketchbook with cream-colored pages, featuring detailed architectural line drawings on both visible pages. The book has a hard cover with a subtle pattern visible along the edges, and a blue ribbon bookmark is draped from the center. Several yellow sticky notes protrude from the back, adding a touch of color and suggesting active use. The pages appear slightly warped, indicating frequent handling. The book is relatively thin, with a compact, portable size suitable for carrying in a bag or backpack.
description: An open sketchbook with architectural line drawings, a blue ribbon bookmark, and yellow sticky notes protruding from the back. The hard cover has a subtle patterned edge.
description_view_0: The book is seen from the side, showing the open pages with visible sketches and the blue ribbon bookmark at the center.
description_view_1: A direct view of the open pages, clearly displaying two architectural sketches and the blue ribbon bookmark.
description_view_2: The opposite side view, highlighting the open pages, sketches, and yellow sticky notes sticking out from the back.
description_view_3: A rear view of the open book, with the yellow sticky notes most visible and the blue ribbon bookmark trailing out.
